name: Persian with Fringe Border Woven Rug - Threshold™
description:
With an intricate print and a distressed finish, this Persian Woven Rug with Fringe Border from Threshold™ sets the perfect foundation for the rest of your decor. Featuring Persian-inspired motifs with blush and teal colorways that offer a sophisticated look, the rug stands up to heavy traffic areas thanks to its flat-pile construction, which makes it easy to clean. The woven design lends welcoming appeal, and it's finished with fringe trim on each end for a textured, cozy look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
